title: Huetrin Jones
content:
{{Top|ga}} {{Otheruses|Jones}} {{Character |type=Resistance |image=[[File:Jones.png]] |name=Huetrin Jones |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human]]{{Film|VIII}} |gender= |pronouns=He/him''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition]]'' |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Resistance]] **[[Resistance navy]]''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]'' states that [[Color|blue]] [[Resistance rank badge]]s with a single vertical marking indicate [[captain]]s of the [[Resistance navy]]. [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']] depicts Huetrin Jones with such a badge. |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We're not clear yet. There are still thirty pallets of cannon shells in C bunker.''"
"''Forget the munitions, there's no time. Just get everyone on the transports.|Huetrin Jones and Kaydel Ko Connix|audio=Jones-and-Connix.flac|}} '''Huetrin Jones''' was a [[human]] who served as a [[captain]] and [[Flight officer|Flight Officer]] in the [[Resistance]] during its [[First Order-Resistance War|war]] against the [[First Order]]. Circa [[34 ABY]], Jones assisted [[Lieutenant]] [[Kaydel Ko Connix]] in [[Battle of D'Qar|evacuating]] the [[Resistance base]] on the [[planet]] [[D'Qar]]. When First Order [[Resurgent-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyers]] arrived at D'Qar during the evacuation, Connix instructed Jones to leave the base's munitions and get the remaining Resistance personnel aboard the departing [[U-55 orbital loadlifter|transports]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Jones, tell the scuttle team to use the computers for target practice and get out of there.|Kaydel Ko Connix|}} Huetrin Jones was a [[Flight officer|Flight Officer]]''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' and [[captain]] in the [[Resistance navy]] during the [[First Order-Resistance War|war]] against the [[First Order]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Starkiller Base]] in [[34 ABY]], which saw the destruction of the First Order [[Starkiller Base|superweapon]],''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas: Updated Edition]]'' Jones was stationed at the [[Resistance base]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]] [[planet]] [[D'Qar]],''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]'' where he assisted in the [[Resistance]]'s [[Battle of D'Qar|evacuation]]. [[File:Jones_Connix_evacuation.png|thumb|left|275px|Huetrin Jones and Kaydel Ko Connix oversee the evacuation of D'Qar.]] During the frantic evacuation, as Jones and [[Lieutenant]] [[Kaydel Ko Connix]] strode across the base's landing field, he informed her that thirty pallets of [[cannon]] shells were still in storage. With [[time]] running short, Connix told Jones to leave the munitions and ensure that the remaining personnel boarded the [[U-55 orbital loadlifter|lifeboats]] departing to the Resistance [[Star Cruiser|cruiser]] [[Raddus (MC85 Star Cruiser)|''Raddus'']]. However, as Connix finished speaking, several First Order [[Resurgent-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyers]] arrived in the [[Ileenium system|D'Qar system]], catching the pair's attention. Fearing that the First Order would send [[slicer]]s and [[droid]]s to scour the Resistance [[databank]]s, Connix ordered Jones to oversee the destruction of the [[computer]]s before evacuating. Jones and Connix commanded the last lifeboat that left D'Qar, and their [[transport]] narrowly outran an [[Orbital bombardment|orbital strike]] from the First Order [[Mandator IV-class Siege Dreadnought|dreadnought]] ''[[Fulminatrix]]''. ==Personality and traits== Huetrin Jones was a tall [[human]] with [[Color|light]] skin, blue [[eye]]s, brown [[hair]], and a beard. He wore a [[Resistance rank badge|badge]] on his tan [[Clothing|uniform]], displaying his [[Military rank|rank]] as a [[Navy|naval]] captain. ==Behind the scenes== {{Dialogue|Huetrin Jones|There are still thirty pallets of cannon shells in C bunker.|Kaydel Ko Connix|Time to completion?|PZ-4CO|Approximately ninety minutes.|Kaydel Ko Connix|We don't have ninety minutes. We may not have nine. Forget the cannon shells and the remaining maintenance stocks. Anything still down below is staying.|attr=Huetrin Jones, Kaydel Ko Connix, and PZ-4CO in ''Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition''|src=}} [[File:JackGreenlees.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Huetrin Jones was portrayed by Jack Greenlees in ''Star Wars: The Last Jedi''.]] Huetrin Jones first appeared in the [[2017]] [[sequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']], which was written and directed by [[Rian Johnson]]. Jones has the first line of dialogue in the film. The character was portrayed by actor [[Jack Greenlees]], who was credited as "Resistance Evacuation [[Officer]]." Jones was first named in [[Jason Fry]]'s [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition|novelization]] and [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition (audiobook)|audiobook]] of the film, which were released in [[2018]]. The character's role in the novelization differs slightly from the film: In the book, Jones speaks to Connix after the First Order's arrival at D'Qar, rather than before, and [[protocol droid]] [[PZ-4CO]] is also present. His first name "Huetrin" was later provided in the [[2019]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'', written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]]. ==Appearances== *{{Film|VIII}} {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition]]'' {{Ab|Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition (audiobook)}} {{1stID|Jones}} *[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi Graphic Novel Adaptation|''Star Wars: The Last Jedi'' Graphic Novel Adaptation]] ===Non-canon appearances=== *''[[William Shakespeare's Jedi the Last: Star Wars Part the Eighth]]'' {{ID|Soldier 1}} ==Sources== *{{SWKidsYouTube|series=Star Wars In Under Five Minutes|text=Star Wars: The Last Jedi|video=KXwPjd2KN5o|nolive=1}} *{{SWKidsYouTube|series=Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures Fun Facts|text=Heroes of the Resistance|video=Xh8XAZmnPDU}} *''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' {{1stID|Huetrin}} *{{SWKidsYouTube|series=Star Wars By the Numbers|text=Every Ship in the Star Wars Sequel Trilogy|video=bb3vhWXClTY|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Huetrin Jones}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Huetrin Jones |fr=Huetrin Jones |ja=ヒュートリン・ジョーンズ |uk=Г'ютрін Джонс }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Jones, Huetrin}} [[Category:Captains]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Resistance Military officers]]
